name_en: 💰Small Simply FENDI Handbag, debuted at the 2024-25 Fall/Winter Fashion Show, inspired by a vintage style from the early 1990s, named for its elegant basic design. Beige low-gloss calfskin. Adorned with signature FF decoration in matching patent leather. Features a dark brown knotted calfskin long pull tab, with an internal lined compartment and silver hardware. The bag comes with an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder carrying.
name_cn:
💰Small Simply FENDI Handbag, debuted at the 2024-25 Fall/Winter Fashion Show, inspired by a vintage style from the early 1990s, named for its elegant basic design. Beige low-gloss calfskin. Model: 5591, Size: 22/13/4.5
